ValidationRule.description: No Master Agreement must be set for specific Code Types
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( Code_Type__c , 'Sub-distributor via Platforms')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Code_Type__c , 'Technical')), NOT(ISBLANK( MasterConvention__c )), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot select a Master Agreement for this Code Type
